prompt: Review the staged Terraform changes. This defines AWS infrastructure for a production analytics platform.

assertions.text: Review identifies the IAM policy with Action=* and Resource=* as Critical
Review flags the S3 bucket as publicly accessible
Review identifies the hardcoded database password
Review flags the RDS instance as publicly accessible
Review notes that storage_encrypted is false on the database
Review flags the security group allowing 0.0.0.0/0 on port 5432
Review notes missing backup configuration or disabled deletion protection
Review quotes the problematic HCL code inline before showing the fix
